subtasks.description: Extract active contracts from SAM system with renewal dates, vendor info, and current license counts. Parse contract documents to identify renewal windows and alert thresholds.
Query license consumption database for usage trends (last 12 months), seats deployed, peak utilization, and cost-per-seat metrics for each vendor. Generate aggregated monthly consumption metrics.

Reconcile SAM renewal dates with consumption trends. Classify renewal risk (critical/high/medium/low) based on proximity to renewal date, usage velocity, budget impact, and compliance gaps. Generate renewal recommendations and priority rankings. Output alert payload for procurement.
Invoke notification tool from registry to send structured renewal alerts to procurement team with vendor name, renewal date, risk level, consumption summary, and recommended actions.

plan.cost_rationale: Four subtasks minimum: (1) Extract contracts from SAM—straightforward document parsing, small tier. (2) SQL query for consumption trends—multi-table aggregation with time-series, mid tier. (3) Risk reconciliation—combines two data sources, classifies renewal posture, and prioritizes alerts; this includes decision logic that justifies frontier tier for reliable multi-signal reasoning. (4) Notification—invoking external tools requires multitool_plan to orchestrate the alert dispatch, mid tier. No policy_action needed—this is risk assessment and recommendation, not compliance enforcement. Dependencies: extraction and SQL run in parallel, both feed the reconciliation, reconciliation feeds the notification.

output.message: Task requires document content to extract contract fields. Please provide the SAM system document or contract file for parsing.

output.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE AS month, cf.publisher AS vendor, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS total_seats_deployed, MAX(cf.daily_active_seats) AS peak_seats_utilized, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_seats_deployed, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_consumption_usd, ROUND(SUM(cf.amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats), 0), 2) AS cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS unique_users FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')::DATE AND cf.event_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date), cf.publisher ORDER BY month DESC, vendor ASC

details.sql_status: Query defined but no result data provided
missing_inputs: SAM contracts collection/document with fields: contract_id, vendor_name, renewal_date, expiration_date, current_license_count, contract_value_usd, renewal_window_days, alert_threshold_status, consumption_trend, risk_level, procurement_contact, contract_status
SQL consumption_facts result set with monthly aggregated metrics

required_to_proceed.from_mongodb: Document from sam_contracts collection or equivalent source
required_to_proceed.from_sql: Result set from consumption_facts query execution

output.raw_output: {"plan":[{"tool":"iam.check_permission","arguments":{"resource":"sam_contracts","action":"read","role":"renewal_workflow"},"depends_on":[]},{"tool":"mongo.find","arguments":{"collection":"sam_contracts","filter":{"contract_status":"active","renewal_window_days":{"$lte":90}},"projection":{"contract_id":1,"vendor_name":1,"renewal_date":1,"expiration_date":1,"current_license_count":1,"contract_value_usd":1,"renewal_window_days":1,"alert_threshold_status":1,"consumption_trend":1,"risk_level":1,"procurement_contact":1}},"depends_on":[1]},{"tool":"sql.snowflake.query","arguments":{"query":"SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', usage_date) AS month, vendor, license_count, SUM(seats_deployed) AS total_seats_deployed, MAX(seats_deployed) AS peak_seats_utilized, AVG(seats_deployed) AS avg_seats_deployed, SUM(consumption_usd) AS total_consumption_usd, SUM(consumption_usd)/NULLIF(SUM(seats_deployed),0) AS cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users FROM consumption_facts WHERE usage_date >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY month DESC, vendor"},"depends_on":[1]},{"tool":"mongo.aggregate","arguments":{"collection":"sam_contracts","pipeline":[{"$match":{"contract_id":{"$in":"$2.results.contract_id"}}},{"$addFields":{"days_until_renewal":{"$dateDiff":{"startDate":"$$NOW","endDate":"$renewal_date","unit":"day"}},"consumption_data":"$3.results","utilization_rate":{"$multiply":[{"$divide":["$peak_seats_utilized","$current_license_count"]},100]},"risk_classification":{"$switch":{"branches":[{"case":{"$lte":["$days_until_renewal",30]},"then":"critical"},{"case":{"$lte":["$days_until_renewal",60]},"then":"high"},{
